form.formComment: Most recently 4th of 10 at Gulfstream Park All Weather on March 21 over 1673m, 7 len behind Classic Move with 55.5kg at $44.10. The start before that 8th of 10 at Gulfstream Park Turf on January 30 over 1509m, 5 len behind Lion Lake with 55.5kg at $76.60. Good effort last start and can build on that performance.

form.formComment: Returns from a 45-day let-up. Most recently 4th in a small field at Santa Anita on March 1 over 1609m, 11 len behind Brooklyn Blonde carrying 55.5kg at $11.10. The race before that 5th of 9 at Santa Anita Turf on January 31 over 1308m, 5 len behind Counterbalance with 55.5kg at $9.10. Can turn things around.

form.formComment: Resumes from a spell after only one run when second last of 9 at Churchill Downs on November 21 over 1207m, 9 len behind Fizzy Lass with 54kg at $19.39. Among the better chances.

form.formComment: First-starter by Tiz The Law out of Colonel's Lady. Hard to gauge so let the betting tell the story.

form.formComment: Resuming after a lengthy spell. Only one run when got back early 8th of 10 at Churchill Downs on June 25 over 1006m, 11 len behind Tiz In Sight carrying 54kg at $10.77. Has the talent to take this out.

form.formComment: Third-up today. Resuming 3rd of 9 at Turfway Park on February 14 over 1308m, 9 len behind Our Shenanigan with 56kg at $8.60. Last start sat on the pace when 3rd of 7 at Turfway Park on March 18 over 1207m, 6 len behind St Gilgen carrying 56.5kg at $5.17. Not keen on her prospects.
